name: io.github.rsmdt/multimodal
description: Multi-provider media generation MCP server. Generate images, videos, audio, and transcriptions using OpenAI, xAI, Gemini, ElevenLabs, and BFL through a unified interface.

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key for image, video, audio generation and transcription

environmentVariables.name: XAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: xAI API key for image and video generation

environmentVariables.name: GEMINI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Google Gemini API key for image, video, and audio generation

environmentVariables.name: ELEVENLABS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: ElevenLabs API key for audio generation and transcription

environmentVariables.name: BFL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: BFL API key for FLUX image generation and editing

environmentVariables.name: MEDIA_OUTPUT_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory for saved media files (defaults to cwd)
